strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, desktop and embedded, with deep TypeScript/Node.js experience directly matching the primary stack.
Current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq actively building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — precisely the AI agent development the role calls for.

Strong software craftsmanship foundation: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus public teaching (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, Web Internals workshop) signalling code quality and collaboration.
concerns: Resume highlights TypeScript, Node.js, React and MongoDB but does not explicitly mention Nest.js or Vitest by name.
Kotlin is not listed; secondary JVM exposure is via Java on robotics and IDE tooling rather than backend services.
Cloud experience is shown via AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployments, but no explicit GCP/Azure breadth is called out.

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js full-stack depth with React and MongoDB
Hands-on AI agent and MCP framework development at re:cinq
Seniority and craftsmanship track record (TDD, CI/CD, architecture, mentoring)

response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned senior/staff-level full-stack engineer whose primary toolkit — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS — maps cleanly onto the role's core stack, and whose current work at re:cinq on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement. He brings 15+ years of polyglot delivery across web, mobile, desktop and embedded, a strong testing and craftsmanship culture (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, public workshops), and proven ability to ship reliable systems at scale (millions of mails at Optilyz, millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby). The combination of senior delivery experience, modern stack alignment, and active AI-agent tooling work makes him a compelling fit for this internal automation tooling role.
